title: Delicate Braised Egyptian Chicken Kebabs
description: A sweet and light Egyptian dish featuring chicken kebabs seasoned with traditional spices, braised to perfection, and served on a hot stone plate, perfect for a post-workout meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, ginger, cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a hot stone plate or a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Braise the chicken kebabs in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until cooked through.
Serve the chicken kebabs hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
Let the chicken rest for a few minutes before serving.
